article.description: — Luka Doncic had 43 points, 13 assists and nine rebounds, and LeBron James added 25 points in the Los Angeles Lakers' fifth consecutive victory, 135-118 over the Los Angeles Clippers on Tuesday night.
article.headline: Luka, LeBron lead Lakers past Clippers 135-118 for 5th straight win, clinching their NBA Cup group

images.caption: LA Clippers vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights
images.name: LA Clippers vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights

article.linkText: Luka, LeBron lead Lakers past Clippers 135-118 for 5th straight win, clinching their NBA Cup group
article.story: LOS ANGELES -- — Luka Doncic had 43 points, 13 assists and nine rebounds, and LeBron James added 25 points in the Los Angeles Lakers' fifth consecutive victory, 135-118 over the Los Angeles Clippers on Tuesday night. Doncic matched his season high with 32 points in the first half on the way to his 51st career 40-point game. He fell just short of his 10th career 40-point triple-double, but the Lakers clinched their group with their third straight win in NBA Cup play. Austin Reaves had 31 points and nine rebounds for the Lakers, who have won 11 of 13 overall. The 40-year-old James also looked more like his old self in the third game of his unprecedented 23rd NBA season, scoring 16 points in the second half while the Lakers steadily pulled away. James Harden continued his scoring surge with 29 points and nine assists for the Clippers, who have lost 11 of 13. Kawhi Leonard scored 19 in his second game back from a 10-game injury absence. The crosstown rivals' first meeting of the season got chippy when Clippers guard Kris Dunn was ejected with 3:33 to play after knocking Doncic to the ground with a hit to his back. Doncic confronted Dunn, who shoved the ball into Doncic's chest before Lakers center Jaxson Hayes shoved Dunn in the back. Dunn then swatted at Hayes, who also got a technical foul. Doncic opened with his highest-scoring quarter of the season, making his first five 3-point attempts — after missing 17 of 22 in his previous two games — and scoring 20 points in the first eight minutes alone. He also directed a stream of trash talk and staredowns at the Clippers' bench, continuing a semi-friendly feud with LA's second team that predates his move to the Lakers. Up next Clippers: Host Memphis on Friday. Lakers: Host Dallas on Friday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/NBA

images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.credit: Nathaniel S. Butler/NBAE via Getty Images
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.caption: The Lakers miss the perimeter shooting that Austin Reaves provides.
images.name: Austin Reaves [1296x729]

images.alt: Luka Doncic #77 of the Los Angeles Lakers handles the ball during the game against the Miami Heat on March 19, 2026 at Kaseya Center in Miami, Florida.
images.caption: The Lakers' championship odds are on the move again after Luka Doncic's injury.
images.name: Luka Doncic [1296x729]

images.alt: Los Angeles Lakers forward LeBron James (23) scores on a breakaway dunk during the first half of an NBA basketball game against the Orlando Magic, Saturday, March 21, 2026, in Orlando, Fla.
images.caption: LeBron James and the Lakers are on a roll as March winds down.
images.name: LeBron James  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs handles the ball during the game against the Detroit Pistons on March 5, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 and Devin Vassell #24 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the New Orleans Pelicans on January 25, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Cade Cunningham #2 of the Detroit Pistons handles the ball during the game against the Denver Nuggets on February 3, 2026 at Little Caesars Arena in Detroit, Michigan.
images.name: Cade Cunningham [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.
images.name: Jaylen Brown [1296x729]

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.
images.caption: Jamal Murray has led the Nuggets while Nikola Jokic recovers from injury.
images.name: Jamal Murray  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the Cleveland Cavaliers on December 29, 2025 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs have seen their odds to win the NBA championship shorten in the past week.

videos.description: Luka Doncic drops 43 points, 13 assists and 9 rebounds to help the Lakers clinch a spot in the knockout stages of the NBA Cup.
videos.headline: Luka's 43-point night helps Lakers clinch Group B

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka's 43-point night helps Lakers clinch Group B) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic is hot early as he drains back-to-back 3-pointers for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Luka feeling it after back-to-back treys

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka feeling it after back-to-back treys) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic cooks up another 3-pointer in the first quarter, giving him 17 points in the frame for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Luka cashes in on his 4th 3-pointer of the 1st quarter

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka cashes in on his 4th 3-pointer of the 1st quarter) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: James Harden drives toward the rim and drops in a floater while drawing contact.
videos.headline: Harden floats in and-1 for the Clippers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Harden floats in and-1 for the Clippers) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: Kobe Brown flies to the rack and posterizes two Lakers defenders for the Clippers.
videos.headline: Kobe Brown throws it down over 2 Lakers

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Kobe Brown throws it down over 2 Lakers) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: Kobe Brown tries to drop in a layup, but LeBron James rises up for the huge block for the Lakers.
videos.headline: LeBron elevates for a massive block

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LeBron elevates for a massive block) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic drives in front of the rim and drops in a fadeaway and-1 for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Luka fades away for a tough and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka fades away for a tough and-1) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: LeBron James gets the ball near the baseline and drops in an and-1 over James Harden.
videos.headline: LeBron draws and-1 on Harden

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LeBron draws and-1 on Harden) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic knocks down a step-back 3-pointer to give him 32 points in the first half for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Luka's 3-pointer gives him 32 points in the 1st half

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka's 3-pointer gives him 32 points in the 1st half) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: LeBron James lasers a pass to Rui Hachimura along the baseline for a Lakers dunk.
videos.headline: LeBron finds Rui for a Lakers jam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LeBron finds Rui for a Lakers jam) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: Kawhi Leonard drops in a smooth jumper from the corner for the Clippers.
videos.headline: Kawhi cashes in on jumper from the corner

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Kawhi cashes in on jumper from the corner) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic passes to a driving LeBron James for a Lakers and-1.
videos.headline: Luka finds LeBron for and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka finds LeBron for and-1) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: LeBron James pulls up from the corner and drops in a 3-pointer for the Lakers.
videos.headline: LeBron drops in a corner 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LeBron drops in a corner 3) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: Jaxson Hayes tosses it up to Rui Hachimura for a two-handed jam for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Jaxson Hayes lobs it to Rui Hachimura for a jam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaxson Hayes lobs it to Rui Hachimura for a jam) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.description: Kris Dunn aggressively pushes ball into Luka Doncic's chest, leading to Jaxson Hayes and Dunn getting into it, eventually resulting in an ejection for the Clippers player.
videos.headline: Dunn ejected after scuffling with Doncic, Hayes

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Dunn ejected after scuffling with Doncic, Hayes) 2025/11/26 ESHEET
